summary: Replace `success: true` with `noop: true` on the empty-body apply path so dry-run/apply consumers can distinguish a successful API write from nothing-to-apply.
reason: `applyAutomationMutation` previously emitted `applied: false, skipped: true, success: true` when there were no matching plans. The combination was ambiguous to agents reading the envelope; an explicit `noop: true` and dropping `success` keeps the two outcomes distinguishable.
validated_outcome: TestAutomationApplyBodyGuardrails covers the new envelope shape and asserts `success` is not present on the no-op branch.
